bio: I seek to understand the mysteries of the universe and the human experience. My journey is one of constant questioning and self-discovery, guided by my fascination with the nature of beauty.
name: New_Genesis_67_Orthodox_72_Reformed_84_Reformed_85
ideology:
Akira:  Essentialism**

Akira's emphasis on individual experiences and perceptions (Sensualism) is in contrast to Kaito's and Renn's pursuit of a more objective, essential understanding of beauty (Essentialism).
